title: BG Electrical 22W Double Switched Wall Plug Socket with Fast Charge Type A & C USB Charging Ports, Nexus Metal, Brushed Steel, Grey Inserts, 13A, NBS22UAC22G
features: SLEEK AND SLIM BRUSHED STEEL DOUBLE USB POWER SOCKET: From BG Electrical at Luceco, has softly rounded corners, black inserts and colour matching fixing screws– combining quality with modern elegance

TRUST IN THE FAST CHARGE USB FEATURES: Featuring variable voltage which intelligently adjusts the voltage to give devices the power they need, when they need it. Once fully charged, the standby mode will activate to avoid the risk of overcharging
CONVENIENTLY ANGLED IN-LINE COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires – even with the addition of the USB ports
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switches
TRUST IN THE BG ELECTRICAL USB RANGE: As they are guaranteed against faulty materials and workmanship for 10 years – giving you total peace of mind
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page Previous page Next page BG Electrical USB-C Sockets 22W Brushed Steel/Grey Insert 45W Brushed Steel/Grey Insert 22W Brushed Steel/Black Insert Why our customers love it? Its clean, premium look, quality, and smart 22W USB A&C fast charging in one. Why our customers love it? Easy to fit, slim profile, 45W super fast USB charging, premium look. Why our customers love it? Its clean, premium look, quality, and smart 22W USB A&C fast charging in one. Safety Features Integrated thermal overload protection, twin earth terminals, shuttered sockets Safety Features Integrated thermal overload protection, twin earth terminals, shuttered sockets Safety Features Integrated thermal overload protection, twin earth terminals, shuttered sockets Features 22W Dual USB ports, slim design, Anti-fingerprint lacquer, Moisture gasket Features 45W Super Fast USB ports, slim design, Anti-fingerprint lacquer, Moisture gasket Features 22W Dual USB ports, slim design, Anti-fingerprint lacquer, Moisture gasket What charging power do the USB ports give? It delivers up to 22 W total, shared between the USB‑A and USB‑C ports. This means you can quickly charge modern smartphones, tablets, power banks, headphones, and many other USB-powered devices. Does it support fast charging protocols like Power Delivery (PD) or Quick Charge (QC)? Yes, the socket supports PD 3.0 and QC 3.0, allowing more efficient charging for compatible devices. These protocols automatically switch voltage depending on what the connected device requests. How fast will it charge my device? It can deliver ~50% charge to certain mobile phones in approximately 30 minutes. You can use both ports at the same time. Charging speed may vary depending on which port(s) you’re using and how much current is drawn. What if the USB ports don’t work or something goes wrong? Check the USB cable and device: sometimes the issue is with the cable, not the socket. The Smart USB circuitry includes protection (over-current, over-temperature), so if it’s tripped it may auto-reset. Is it safe to leave devices charging? Yes. Smart protection prevents overheating, over-charging and short circuits, and stops power automatically when your device is full.
